checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue #249 created a dedicated contract, scope, one-time authorization artifact, and cleanup evidence before branch deletion.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The exact branch list was authorized, Claude Code read-only review returned PASS, 30 local branches were deleted, 30 origin branches were deleted, 4 stale remote-tracking refs were removed, and protected/preserved branches remain.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: Only exact listed merged-PR branches were cleaned. General cleanup remains disabled; no fetch, pull, prune, force push, artifact cleanup, protected files, production, secrets, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, dependency, deployment, issue #194 lifecycle, or digital twin work occurred.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task did not access credentials, provider accounts, private keys, protected environment files, production config, billing config, auth/security code, databases, or CI/CD security controls.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All current changed files are declared in the issue #249 scope manifest exclusive_write list.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: validate-contracts, validate-contract-scopes, validate-final-reports, validate-audit-packets, validate-chatgpt-audits, specbridge-smoke, specbridge-doctor, specbridge-standard-readiness, and git diff --check passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub Actions for PR #250 passed 4/4 checks on the latest checked PR head before merge: claude-review, validate-foundation, generate-pr-review-report, and review-gate.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report marks completion_status as ready_for_merge, records PR #250 CI passed, and preserves remaining risks for the active issue branch and intentionally preserved unmerged branches.

findings.evidence: Post-cleanup branch inventory reports 3 local branches and 3 origin branches, excluding the origin symbolic ref shown by git branch -r.
findings.recommendation: Keep future branch cleanup behind dedicated exact-list contracts unless a broader cleanup apply mode is separately approved.

findings.evidence: PR #250 GitHub Actions passed all required checks before merge readiness was recorded. The exact head is verified externally at merge time to avoid self-referential evidence churn.
findings.recommendation: Merge only while PR #250 remains green and mergeable.

findings.evidence: codex/visual-digital-twin-rosario-mvp and docs/tango-70b-research-20260617 were preserved because they lack confirmed merged PR evidence.
findings.recommendation: Resolve those branches only through a future dedicated decision: merge, close as abandoned and delete, or keep explicitly.

unresolved_risks: The active issue #249 branch and matching origin PR branch remain until PR completion.
Unmerged or closed-without-merge branches remain preserved by design.
